description: Relative Body Node is a ProtoFlux node that returns a hand if the Node (BodyNode) provided is a finger or a palm, returns Head if it is an eye, and returns "Root" otherwise. Unless it is "None" which returns "None".

fields.Node: The node to find the relative node for.
fields.* ([[Type:BodyNode|BodyNode]]): Returns a hand if the Node (BodyNode) provided is a finger or a palm, returns Head if it is an eye, and returns "Root" otherwise. Unless it is "None" which returns "None".
